title: Kalevala: The Forging of the Sampo
description: The smith Ilmarinen forges the Sampo — a mysterious magical mill that grinds out prosperity — the most coveted object in Finnish mythology.
introduction: The smith Ilmarinen forges the Sampo — a mysterious magical mill that grinds out prosperity — the most coveted object in Finnish mythology.

translation.original_text: Takoi ilman Ilmarinen, takoi taivahan takoja.
translation.text: Ilmarinen hammered, the eternal hammerer forged.
